name: Telescope
description: Telescoping square frames drawing inward, re-mixing colour on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 0deg, 45deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 20%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 38%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 500ms; transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
